request_text: Restructure docs/plans/ docsite directory per the approved design: keep only index.md + 3-2-x-milestone-roadmap.md top-level; move 40 finer plan docs into 6 themed nested subdirs; author subdir index hubs; reconcile plans/index.md; fix related-frontmatter + 2 body links; regenerate the page-inventory lockfile. Folds into PR #2401.
